items.headline: A promising path to a bipartisan fix of Social Security emerges | San Diego Union-Tribune
items.summary: The need to reform Social Security — to keep by far the most important government assistance program solvent — has long been obvious.

items.headline: Sweet Delite partners with United Way summer event
items.summary: Sweet Delite will host a United Way summer event July 15 from 11 a.m. to 2 p.m. at the Annex lot, donating 18 percent of all sales to support United Way.

items.headline: Sam Neill, 'Jurassic Park' star, dies at 78 after cancer-free reveal
items.summary: Sam Neill, the actor best known for playing Dr. Alan Grant in the "Jurassic Park" franchise, has died. He was 78.
